mapper.sql: id, user_id, message_id, biz_type, status, read_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message (user_id, message_id, biz_type, status, read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{messageId}, #{bizType}, #{status.code}, #{readTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
